name: RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-36
title: test/run.py omits three tests; test-hook-rename.py is stale (checks for .sh files post-Python migration)
description: test/run.py SUITES list omits: test-RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG13-claude-md-gitignore-drift.py, test-RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG2-python-only.py, test-hook-rename.py. The first two are valid test files that should run as part of the suite. The third (test-hook-rename.py) asserts the existence of refresh.sh, session-init.sh, sync-check.sh (lines 45-49) which contradicts the post-migration Python-only world; running it would always fail. Resolution: register BACKLOG13 and BACKLOG2 tests in run.py; either delete test-hook-rename.py (rename migration is historical) or update it to test for .py filenames.

history.note: wave-4 cleanup; fixed in e10610a (impl) and 91f2c68 (tests)
